summary: Establish and refine the standard repository contract used by every public StrataLabs project.

milestones.title: Publish the project metadata contract
milestones.description: Define the identity, lifecycle, documentation, ordering, and external-link fields consumed by StrataLabs.

milestones.title: Publish the roadmap contract
milestones.description: Define stable roadmap and milestone fields for hourly website synchronization.

milestones.title: Add automated metadata validation
milestones.description: Validate project and roadmap JSON during pull requests.

milestones.title: Add real project migration examples
milestones.description: Document representative migrations for libraries, applications, CLIs, and integrations.
